subcodes.title: Words spoken in 1910
subcodes.first_line: The (Holy) Spirit is encompassing and surrounding all. It is holy. It is sanctified from attachment to a special place. It is present everywhere and at every time. It exists in all places, yet is placeless.
subcodes.subjects: @The Holy Spirit, @God as immanent vs. transcendent reality, @transcendence; unknowability of God
